subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who standeth alone in His grandeur and is unique through His Word, whereupon its revelation hath manifested the Ultimate Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی توحد بالعظمه و تفرد بالکلمة التی اذا ظهرت ظهرت الحاقة
subcodes.subjects: @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @suffering and imprisonment, @prophecy and fulfillment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
